castle_approach.message: A young knight named Rudolf Ruleman with his sleepy horse, Snoozy, encountered a castle. In one of the balconies there was a princess. What does Rudolf do?

choices.text: Get inside and ask her to marry him

get_inside_castle.message: He knocked on the door and an old man dressed as the buttler opened.-What do you want?-I am Knight Rudolf Ruleman from the Ruleman City and I want to marry the princess.-Sure, take this paper and when your number comes you can speak with the king.The number is 73. What does Rudolf do?
